homepage.title: Patricia Ferguson MP | Proud To Serve Glasgow West
homepage.meta_description: It is a great honour to be elected as the first MP for the Glasgow West constituency. You can find out all about my constituency work here.

homepage.text_excerpt: Patricia Ferguson MP | Proud To Serve Glasgow West Patricia Ferguson MP for Glasgow West About News & Media Surgeries Contact Working hard for Glasgow West News & Media Patricia Ferguson MP Proud to serve Glasgow West It is a great honour to be elected as the first MP for the Glasgow West constituency. Since that time I have been working hard meeting local groups, organisations & individuals; and representing the interests of my constituents in Parliament. You can find out all about my constituency work, surgery times and more here on my website. News & Media Read Post May 1, 2026 News from Patricia Ferguson MP – April 2026 Read Post April 27, 2026 Herbie’s Law Campaign Read Post April 24, 2026 GMB Union Inclusive PPE Campaign Read Post April 22, 2026 Victoria Park ‘Spring into Summer’ Fun Day View All Posts Surgeries Surgeries are regularly held throughout the Glasgow West region. To book an appointment email me at patricia.ferguson.mp@parliament.uk or call my team on 0141 370 2324. Knightswood 1st Friday of each month at 4pm Partick 2nd Friday of each month at 10am Anniesland 1st Saturday of each month at 10am Drumchapel 3rd Friday of each month at 10am Whiteinch 4th Friday of each month at 3:30pm Glasgow West Constituency Click on the image below to download a PDF map showcasing Glasgow West constituency. Click on the button below to download a PDF map showcasing Glasgow West constituency. Download Map Get In Touch As your local MP, I can help you with a wide range of issues. Please use the form to contact my office. Name (Required) Email (Required) Address (Required) Street Address City Post Code Your Message (Required) CAPTCHA Consent (Required) I agree to the privacy policy . news_items.title: Patricia Ferguson MP for Glasgow West

pages.title: Herbie's Law Campaign
pages.meta_description: I joined campaigners & experts to add my support to the Herbie's Law campaign for animal free research in the UK. I support the phase out of animal testing & welcomed the UK Labour Government's plan for this published last year. Read more about Herbie's Law https://bit.ly/4tviDNP ...

pages.text_excerpt: Herbie's Law Campaign Patricia Ferguson MP for Glasgow West About News & Media Surgeries Contact Herbie’s Law Campaign Story published on: April 27, 2026 I joined campaigners & experts to add my support to the Herbie’s Law campaign for animal free research in the UK. I support the phase out of animal testing & welcomed the UK Labour Government’s plan for this published last year.
